concerns.reason: This creates a clinical contradiction within the Medications section, as Lasix 40mg IV is listed as being taken.

recommended_revisions.suggested: Diuretics were previously held [E:note:row541449:6], though Lasix 40mg IV is now listed [E:note:row541449:10].
recommended_revisions.reason: Resolves the internal inconsistency between the 'held' status and the active administration of Lasix.
